name: Mini Monte Cristo Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 1 package Env. Golden Onion Soup Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Use either type of cheese, but not both.
2. Blend 2 tablespoons butter with mustard and spread evenly on each bread slice.
3. Equally top 4 bread slices with cheese and ham; then top with the remaining bread, buttered side down.
4. Cut each sandwich into 4 triangles.
5. Beat eggs, milk, and golden onion soup mix until well blended.
6. Dip sandwiches in egg mixture, coating them well.
7. In a large skillet, melt 1/4 cup butter and cook sandwiches over medium heat, turning once until golden.
8. Makes about 16 mini sandwiches
